ddls:
CREATE TABLE "health_data" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "screened" INTEGER /* Total number of people screened */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of lab-confirmed cases */,
  "discharged" INTEGER /* Number of discharged patients */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths in confirmed cases */,
  "data_entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the data */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is current or historical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the state's health department */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the state belongs */,
  "health_department_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the state's health department */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the state's information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the state is currently active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screening" (
  "screening_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screening event */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where screening took place */,
  "screened_date" TEXT /* Date when the screening occurred */,
  "screened_count" INTEGER /* Number of people screened on that date */,
  "screening_location" TEXT /* Location within the state where the screening took place */,
  "screening_type" TEXT /* Type of screening (e.g., mass screening, targeted screening) */,
  "screening_method" TEXT /* Method used for screening (e.g., PCR, rapid test) */,
  "positive_count" INTEGER /* Number of positive cases from the screening */,
  "negative_count" INTEGER /* Number of negative cases from the screening */,
  "pending_count" INTEGER /* Number of pending results */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the screening data */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the screening data is current or historical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("screening_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screening_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the case was confirmed */,
  "confirmed_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was confirmed */,
  "discharged_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was discharged */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient died due to the confirmed case */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms reported by the patient */,
  "comorbidities" TEXT /* Existing health conditions */,
  "treatment_center" TEXT /* Treatment center where the patient was treated */,
  "discharge_status" TEXT /* Reason for discharge (e.g., recovery, transfer, other) */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the case data */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the case data is current or historical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
